name: Carmelized Muskrat Onaplank (Muskrat on a Plank)
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the fresh muskrat and discard the skin. Discard the carcass.
2. Nail the muskrat to a hickory plank, carefully stretching out.
3. Chop green onions finely.
4. Heat cooking oil in a 2-quart pot over medium heat.
5. Add chopped onions and remaining ingredients (salt, pepper, fish sauce) to the pot.
6. Saute on medium heat until the sauce thickens slightly or caramelizes—about 5 minutes.
7. Place planked muskrat in a large pot with 4 cups of water.
8. Simmer uncovered on medium heat for one hour.
9. Add fish sauce and continue simmering for an additional hour.
10. Most water will be absorbed by the meat; discard the carcass.
11. Serve hot as a main dish with rice.
